meta.title: Work & Projects
meta.description: Selected systems and products spanning agentic AI workflows, internal automation, and operations-grounded software delivery.

sections.intro: This page highlights systems I have built and operated across operations, internal tooling, and software. Current focus is AI workflow execution: contract-driven planning, gated side effects, structured traces, and practical automation that supports real teams. Before software, I led high-variance operational environments, which is why my build style stays grounded in reliability, clear ownership, and feedback loops that close.
